---
title: "Group 1 Survival Analysis Project"
author: "Group 1"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## STEP 1: Data Preparation and Baseline Table

```{r}
library(survival)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(finalfit)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(survminer)
library(flexsurv)
library(gridExtra)
library(tibble)

data(cancer, package = "survival")

df_veteran <- veteran

if (all(sort(unique(na.omit(df_veteran$status))) == c(1, 2))) {
  df_veteran <- df_veteran %>%
    mutate(status = status - 1)
}

df_veteran <- df_veteran %>%
  mutate(
    trt = factor(trt, levels = c(1, 2), labels = c("Standard", "Test")),
    celltype = as.character(celltype),
    celltype = case_when(
      celltype %in% c("1", "squamous") ~ "Squamous",
      celltype %in% c("2", "smallcell") ~ "Small cell",
      celltype %in% c("3", "adeno") ~ "Adeno",
      celltype %in% c("4", "large") ~ "Large",
      TRUE ~ celltype
    ),
    celltype = factor(celltype, levels = c("Squamous", "Small cell", "Adeno", "Large")),
    prior = factor(ifelse(prior == 0, "No", "Yes"), levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    event_label = factor(status, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Censored", "Death"))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    age = ff_label(age, "Age (years)"),
    karno = ff_label(karno, "Karnofsky score"),
    diagtime = ff_label(diagtime, "Months from diagnosis"),
    time = ff_label(time, "Survival time (days)"),
    celltype = ff_label(celltype, "Cell type"),
    prior = ff_label(prior, "Prior therapy"),
    event_label = ff_label(event_label, "Death (event)")
  )
```



## STEP 2: Exploratory Analysis




```{r}
dependent <- "trt"
explanatory <- c("age", "karno", "diagtime", "time", "celltype", "prior", "event_label")

table1 <- df_veteran %>%
  summary_factorlist(
    dependent = dependent,
    explanatory = explanatory,
    total_col = TRUE,
    p = TRUE,
    na_include = FALSE,
    p_cont_para = "t.test",
    p_cat = "fisher",
    add_dependent_label = FALSE
  ) %>%
  ff_row_totals(
    .data = df_veteran,
    dependent = dependent,
    explanatory = explanatory,
    total_name = "Total N",
    na_name = "Missing N"
  )

if ("label" %in% names(table1)) {
  table1 <- table1 %>% rename(Variable = label)
}

if ("all" %in% names(table1)) {
  table1 <- table1 %>% rename(Overall = all)
}

n_control <- sum(df_veteran$trt == "Standard", na.rm = TRUE)
n_test <- sum(df_veteran$trt == "Test", na.rm = TRUE)
n_total <- nrow(df_veteran)

names(table1)[names(table1) == "Standard"] <- paste0("Control (N=", n_control, ")")
names(table1)[names(table1) == "Test"] <- paste0("Test therapy (N=", n_test, ")")
names(table1)[names(table1) == "Overall"] <- paste0("Overall (N=", n_total, ")")

if ("Variable" %in% names(table1)) {
  table1 <- table1 %>%
    mutate(Variable = paste0(Variable, "   "))
}
baseline <- kbl(
  table1,
  format = "html",
  align = "l",
  caption = ""
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    font_size = 18,
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive")
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#1F4E79") %>%
  row_spec(1:nrow(table1), extra_css = "border-bottom: 1px solid #999;") %>%
  column_spec(1, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(2, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(3, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(4, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(5, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(6, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(7, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(8, color = "black", width = "8em")

baseline

save_kable(baseline, "baseline_table.png", zoom = 4)
```






```{r}
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

sum_tab <- data.frame(
  "Sample Size" = nrow(veteran),
  "Events" = sum(veteran$status == 1),
  "Censored" = sum(veteran$status == 0),
  "Mean Time" = round(mean(veteran$time, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  "Min Time" = min(veteran$time, na.rm = TRUE),
  "Max Time" = max(veteran$time, na.rm = TRUE),
  "Mean Age" = round(mean(veteran$age, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  "Mean Karno" = round(mean(veteran$karno, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  check.names = FALSE
)

sum_kbl <- kbl(
  sum_tab,
  format = "html",
  align = "c",
  caption = ""
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    font_size = 18,
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed")
  ) %>%
  row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#1F4E79") %>%
  row_spec(1:nrow(sum_tab), extra_css = "border-bottom: 1px solid #999;") %>%
  column_spec(1, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(2, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(3, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(4, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(5, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(6, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(7, color = "black", width = "8em") %>%
  column_spec(8, color = "black", width = "8em")

sum_kbl

save_kable(sum_kbl, "summary_table.png", zoom = 4)
```





### Minimum and Maximum 

```{r}
range_plot_data <- df_veteran %>%
  summarise(
    age_min = min(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    age_max = max(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    karno_min = min(karno, na.rm = TRUE),
    karno_max = max(karno, na.rm = TRUE),
    diagtime_min = min(diagtime, na.rm = TRUE),
    diagtime_max = max(diagtime, na.rm = TRUE),
    time_min = min(time, na.rm = TRUE),
    time_max = max(time, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = c("Variable", "Statistic"),
    names_sep = "_",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

ggplot(range_plot_data, aes(x = Variable, y = Value, fill = Statistic)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(Value, 1)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
  "min" = "darkgreen",
  "max" = "#A52A2A"
))+
  labs(
    title = "Minimum and Maximum Values of Key Variables",
    x = "Variable",
    y = "Value"
  ) +
  theme_pubr(base_size = 13)+
  theme(legend.position = "right", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.1,vjust = 0.1, ))
```













### Survival times distribution




```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false


ggplot(df_veteran, aes(x = time)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 40, fill = "darkgreen", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Survival Times",
    x = "Survival time (days)",
    y = "Number of patients"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_veteran$time)), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme_pubr()+
  theme(legend.position = "right", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.2,vjust = 0.1, ))
```




### Swimmer plot to visualize the death and censored


```{r}
swimmer_df <- df_veteran %>%
  mutate(
    id = row_number(),
    start = 0,
    end = time,
    event = ifelse(status == 1, 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  slice(1:20)

swimmer_plot <- ggplot(swimmer_df, aes(y = factor(id))) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = start, xend = end, yend = factor(id)),
    linewidth = 1.2,
    colour = "steelblue"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = end, shape = factor(event), colour = factor(event)),
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17), labels = c("Censored", "Death")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("grey40", "firebrick"), labels = c("Censored", "Death")) +
  labs(
    x = "Time (days)",
    y = "Patient ID",
    shape = "Outcome",
    colour = "Outcome",
    title = "Sample of censored and death"
  ) +
   theme_pubr()+
  theme(legend.position = "right", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.2,vjust = 0.1, ))

swimmer_plot
```
